king.translate: царь, король, монарх, властитель, дамка, править, повелевать, управлять
mnemonic: king [кинг] король - Мартин Лютер (Кинг) - король всех негров.

examples.eng: The King wills it.
Long live the King!
They all wait on the king.
The king is in check.
His Majesty the King
Voltaire, the uncrowned king of his age
He became king at a young age.
examples.ru: Он стал королём в молодом возрасте.

examples.eng: He was proclaimed King
King Philip II of Spain
I led the king of trumps.
He bowed before the King.
The king takes the queen.
The king and queen had fled.
He swore fealty to the king.
the sovereign power of a king
He was voted king of the prom.
He bowed before the king.
DNA is the king of molecules.
The king abdicated the throne.
The lion is the king of beasts.
The king's herald walked before.
They had to treat with the King.
examples.ru: Им пришлось вести переговоры с королём.

examples.eng: The King is so merciful to them.
The king was forced to abdicate.
examples.ru: Король был вынужден отречься от престола.

examples.eng: The king's head was chopped off.
He who betrays his king must die.
examples.ru: Тот, кто предает своего короля, должен умереть.

examples.eng: The King came honeying about her.
examples.ru: Король подошёл, что-то вкрадчиво о ней говоря.

examples.eng: The King will proclaim an amnesty.
The king was tumbled on the plain.
examples.ru: Король был разбит на поле брани.

examples.eng: the King James Version of the Bible
